title: The Gang Goes to a Water Park

jokes.text: Oh, Christ, does every single one of these kids have the flu?
jokes.setup: Gang arriving at water park filled with children
jokes.punchline: Immediate disgust and assumption all kids are diseased
jokes.explanation: Establishes character neurosis about germs, economical line that sets tone

jokes.text: You're like, 'What's that rascal Charlie up to?' 'What's he up to this time?' Right, right? - I'm not thinking that at all.
jokes.setup: Charlie assumes others are fascinated by his racing suit
jokes.punchline: Mac's flat denial of any interest whatsoever
jokes.explanation: Classic Charlie delusion paired with perfect deadpan dismissal

jokes.text: You're like, "What's that rascal Charlie up to?" "What's he up to this time?" Right, right? - I'm not thinking that at all.
jokes.setup: Charlie projects enthusiasm onto his friends
jokes.punchline: Mac's brutal honesty about not caring
jokes.explanation: Excellent character work - Charlie's delusional self-importance vs Mac's complete disinterest

jokes.text: Yeah, the brochure says three days. We're saying bullshit to that. We're gonna get it done in one.
jokes.setup: Normal expectation of water park visit duration
jokes.punchline: Aggressive rejection of reasonable timeframe
jokes.explanation: Their competitive approach to leisure activity is characteristically absurd

jokes.text: ten minutes of clean water and then every slide's basically a urine delivery system
jokes.setup: Discussion of water park experience
jokes.punchline: Graphic description of slides as piss transportation
jokes.explanation: Brilliant, disgusting metaphor that reframes the entire water park experience

jokes.text: Hot food, cold beer, bikini'd women seeking relief from the insufferable prison of motherhood
jokes.setup: Frank explaining why he comes to water park
jokes.punchline: Predatory view disguised as poetic observation
jokes.explanation: Frank's creepy worldview delivered with literary pretension

jokes.text: Uh, it's a urine tester. Just want to be 100% sure. It turns light red at the slightest hint of piss.
jokes.setup: Mac producing scientific equipment at water park
jokes.punchline: Portable piss detection for slide safety
jokes.explanation: Mac's neurotic preparation taken to scientific extreme

jokes.text: Not me, I had my bracelet laminated in the '90s. I haven't paid to get in here since I was 14.
jokes.setup: Discussion of park admission costs
jokes.punchline: Long-term admission fraud with 20+ year timeline
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dee scam with impressive scope and casual delivery

jokes.text: Shut up, nerd! / Screw you, nerd!
jokes.setup: Lifeguard enforcing size requirement
jokes.punchline: Immediate hostility toward rule enforcement
jokes.explanation: Childish response fits characters but lacks originality

jokes.text: Do not go near the pool drains, no matter how good you might think they feel on your butt
jokes.setup: Mac giving safety warning
jokes.punchline: Implication he's personally experienced drain pleasure
jokes.explanation: Disturbing safety advice with uncomfortable personal knowledge

jokes.text: Those things will suck the intestines right out of you. Like it did to that one kid back in '96. Now, she had to chew through her intestines just to get free.
jokes.setup: Pool drain warning continues
jokes.punchline: Grotesque urban legend delivered matter-of-factly
jokes.explanation: Over-the-top gross-out story that Mac believes completely

jokes.text: Getting stuck in the kiddie slide together
jokes.setup: Adults ignoring size restrictions
jokes.punchline: Predictable consequence played for extended discomfort
jokes.explanation: Physical comedy setup that enables later gross-out sequences

jokes.text: I can't ever tell which way is north on a map. / It's at the top. / I thought north was, like, up.
jokes.setup: Charlie explaining their navigation problems
jokes.punchline: Complete inability to understand basic map reading
jokes.explanation: Perfect Charlie confusion about basic concepts

jokes.text: Oh, Ethan is here with a special program for children with leukemia, so he skips to the front of the line.
jokes.setup: Someone cuts in line ahead of Mac and Charlie
jokes.punchline: Innocent explanation sets up Mac and Charlie's scheme
jokes.explanation: Setup for the AIDS scheme - works more as plot advancement than standalone joke

jokes.text: AIDS! AIDS, I got AIDS. I got AIDS, we're coming through.
jokes.setup: Seeing disabled kid skip lines
jokes.punchline: Immediately faking terminal illness for line-cutting
jokes.explanation: Characteristically awful behavior, highly quotable but not particularly clever

jokes.text: He got it from a gay guy in the '80s. / I'm not gay, I didn't... / There's two kind of AIDS... there's the vagina AIDS and then the needle-based AIDS.
jokes.setup: Elaborating on fake AIDS story
jokes.punchline: Ignorant, offensive categorization of HIV transmission
jokes.explanation: Cringe humor from characters' ignorance, but feels dated and cheap

jokes.text: Let a little sunshine back into her life ever since her mom... / Oh, my God. Did she... / Die horrifically? / Yeah. Drowning. Kind of ironic, us being at a water park
jokes.setup: Frank appearing to bond with another parent
jokes.punchline: Casual revelation of tragic backstory with location irony
jokes.explanation: Frank's casual approach to tragedy with perfect dark irony

jokes.text: Can I please have $20? / Well, I think you can get something to eat for a lot less than that, hon. / Dad! I'm hungry, I'm starving, and you haven't given me any money.
jokes.setup: Child asking parent for money
jokes.punchline: Manipulative child immediately switching tactics when denied
jokes.explanation: Sets up Abby's manipulative nature, solid character work

jokes.text: Interesting. / What's interesting? / Nothing. I'm done with you.
jokes.setup: Frank observing family dynamics
jokes.punchline: Abrupt dismissal after getting what he wanted to see
jokes.explanation: Frank's predatory social interaction ending abruptly

jokes.text: Sherman, did you pee? / No. / Sherman, my vial is turning light pink. / Ugh... goddamn it, Sherman, I ordered you not to pee!
jokes.setup: Mac's piss-testing vial changing color
jokes.punchline: Child peeing despite explicit orders, Mac treating it like military insubordination
jokes.explanation: Callback to piss detector with Mac's authoritarian reaction to child

jokes.text: Don't question him; we need God! / God didn't put the sun anywhere. The sun stays still; the Earth moves around it.
jokes.setup: Mac invoking God for their predicament
jokes.punchline: Dee's pedantic astronomy correction in crisis situation
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Mac's religiosity vs Dee's know-it-all nature

jokes.text: no matter how alluring it is, do not put your genitals or your butthole near the pool drain. You got it? In fact, cover your butthole.
jokes.setup: Mac giving safety advice to escaping child
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate detailed instructions about protecting genitals
jokes.explanation: Mac's inappropriate child interaction continuing his drain fixation

jokes.text: Mac. Stop talking to children about their buttholes, okay? It's not appropriate.
jokes.setup: Mac's inappropriate child safety advice
jokes.punchline: Dee's reasonable but obvious correction
jokes.explanation: Good straight-man response that highlights how inappropriate Mac's behavior is

jokes.text: That kid looks passed out, Dee. / Yeah, he's out cold, but I think I can maneuver his body pretty easily. / Yeah, but if we send him down there, he might drown. / Guys, I gotta take a poop.
jokes.setup: Discussing using unconscious child as escape method
jokes.punchline: Casual consideration of child endangerment interrupted by bathroom emergency
jokes.explanation: Dark escalation of their desperation with perfect timing interruption

jokes.text: Officer Dennis Reynolds. Hi. Off-duty, of course. This is your jurisdiction.
jokes.setup: Dennis intervening in shoplifting situation
jokes.punchline: Fake cop identity with professional courtesy
jokes.explanation: Dennis's manipulation elevated with fake authority, perfectly delivered

jokes.text: Try to touch me, and I'll scream 'rape.'
jokes.setup: Dennis trying to discipline the child
jokes.punchline: Child threatening false accusation
jokes.explanation: Shocking line from child character, disturbing but fits show's dark tone

jokes.text: you want to be a thief or do you want to be an artist? You see, an artist takes whatever he wants when somebody's looking right at him.
jokes.setup: Dennis mentoring Abby in theft
jokes.punchline: Elevating stealing to artistic philosophy
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis pseudo-intellectual justification for criminal behavior, highly quotable

jokes.text: AIDS! Guy with AIDS, coming through. / Hey, man, go through. / No, you need a raft! You need a raft!
jokes.setup: Continuing the fake AIDS scheme
jokes.punchline: Safety concern overriding disability accommodation
jokes.explanation: Callback to AIDS scam with diminishing returns

jokes.text: What are you guys doing? You guys doing a AIDS thing? / Oh, yeah! / I gave Frank a couple hickeys to sell the lesions. / Sucked on 'em.
jokes.setup: Dennis discovering their scheme
jokes.punchline: Grotesque method acting for fake disease symptoms
jokes.explanation: Disturbing commitment to the bit with gross physical details

jokes.text: Oh, that's our new slide. It's, uh, Thunder Gun Express. / Like the movie? / Yeah, but there's no water or anything yet, so we still have to test it. / It's totally dry.
jokes.setup: Discovery of new slide under construction
jokes.punchline: No water means dangerous dry concrete slide
jokes.explanation: Good setup for physical comedy climax, builds tension well

jokes.text: It's Thunder Gun, man. No hesitation. No surrender. No man left behind. We got to get to the top of that slide. And raw-dog the shit out of it!
jokes.setup: Frank seeing Thunder Gun branded slide
jokes.punchline: Military movie quotes applied to dangerous slide attempt
jokes.explanation: Frank's action movie obsession driving dangerous decision

jokes.text: My vial is blood red. That's because the water's not even running through anymore. It's just pooling up.
jokes.setup: Mac checking his urine detector again
jokes.punchline: Situation has deteriorated to pure bodily fluid stagnation
jokes.explanation: Callback to testing device showing escalation of grossness

jokes.text: The problem is it's already happening. I'm peeing on your shoulder right now. But I don't mean to, I'm sorry. / It's warm.
jokes.setup: Dee unable to hold bladder any longer
jokes.punchline: Involuntary urination with detailed sensory description
jokes.explanation: Gross-out humor that escalates their predicament

jokes.text: Oh, I peed as soon as we got in the slide. / Me, too.
jokes.setup: Mac criticizing Dee for peeing
jokes.punchline: Mac and child have been peeing the entire time
jokes.explanation: Perfect hypocrisy reveal with economical delivery

jokes.text: Like the girl in the pool drain when she got her anus stuck, she chewed through her prolapsed anus and chewed herself to freedom.
jokes.setup: Mac explaining Sherman should chew through bracelet
jokes.punchline: Callback to earlier pool drain story with even more grotesque details
jokes.explanation: Callback with escalated grossness, Mac's obsession continuing

jokes.text: I said I'd kiss him if he met me in the parking lot. Then I swiped his wristband, so he can't get back in.
jokes.setup: Abby explaining how she got new wristband
jokes.punchline: Romantic manipulation of peer for theft opportunity
jokes.explanation: Sophisticated child criminality showing Dennis's influence

jokes.text: When I was your age, I couldn't have accomplished half the things you did today. See, this is why the Chinese are destroying us. If you were born in China, you'd be the head of some factory by now. Or they would've thrown you in a river, 'cause you weren't a boy.
jokes.setup: Dennis praising Abby's criminal skills
jokes.punchline: Racist generalization undermined by infanticide reference
jokes.explanation: Dennis's casual racism and misogyny disguised as compliment

jokes.text: I don't have a daughter. / Yes, you do. The girl that was just...
jokes.setup: Dennis confronting woman about Abby
jokes.punchline: Revelation that Abby isn't this woman's daughter
jokes.explanation: Brilliant revelation that recontextualizes entire Dennis/Abby relationship

jokes.text: Dennis realizing he's been conned by Abby
jokes.setup: Dennis discovering Abby isn't who he thought
jokes.punchline: Master manipulator realizing he's been outplayed by a child
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Dennis's narcissism deflated by superior con artist

jokes.text: Oh, it burns! It burns! It burns! It burns! Aah! / My back! / That guy has AIDS!
jokes.setup: Frank going down dry concrete slide
jokes.punchline: Painful consequences with AIDS panic from bystanders
jokes.explanation: Physical comedy payoff with callback to fake disease scheme

jokes.text: They should've sent a poet. / All right, let's go, let's go.
jokes.setup: Frank and Charlie admire the dangerous slide
jokes.punchline: Frank's pretentious movie reference about slide beauty
jokes.explanation: Decent Frank pretension but not particularly memorable or well-integrated

jokes.text: There's AIDS blood in the pool! / That's goddamn AIDS blood?! / Has anyone seen my son? / Goddamn it! I hate this goddamn water park!
jokes.setup: Park visitors seeing Frank's injuries
jokes.punchline: Mass panic about contaminated water and general park frustration
jokes.explanation: Chaotic conclusion showing consequences of their schemes
